call_pattern: Low sustained growl, teeth bared, no barking
behavioral_meaning: Direct threat display. Dog is warning of imminent attack if approach continues.
behavioral_response: Target should freeze, avoid eye contact, slowly back away.
translation_template: Do not come any closer. I am warning you. This is your last warning before I act.

intensity_modifiers.high: BACK OFF RIGHT NOW. I am NOT bluffing. One more step and I WILL bite.
intensity_modifiers.medium: I don't like this. Stay where you are. I'm watching you very carefully.
intensity_modifiers.low: I'm a little uncomfortable. Please give me some space.

call_pattern: Short, high-pitched repeated barks with play bow
behavioral_meaning: Play solicitation. Dog is excited and wants to engage in social play.
behavioral_response: Play partner responds with reciprocal play signals.
translation_template: Come on, come ON! Let's play! Why are you just standing there?? PLAY WITH ME!

intensity_modifiers.high: PLAY! PLAY! PLAY! I can't CONTAIN myself! Throw the ball! Chase me! DO SOMETHING!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Hey, wanna play? I'm in the mood for some fun! Come on!
intensity_modifiers.low: I could go for a little game if you're up for it.

behavioral_meaning: Separation anxiety, pain, or fear. Dog is communicating distress and seeking comfort.
behavioral_response: Owner should assess for pain, provide comfort, or address separation trigger.
translation_template: I'm scared and I don't know what to do. Please don't leave me. I need you here.

intensity_modifiers.high: Please PLEASE don't leave me alone! I can't handle this! Something is WRONG!
intensity_modifiers.medium: I'm not feeling great about this situation. Can you come back?
intensity_modifiers.low: I miss you. Just a little worried but I'll manage.

call_pattern: Soft whimper with lowered body, tail tucked, averting gaze
behavioral_meaning: Appeasement signal. Dog is communicating non-threat and deference.
behavioral_response: Dominant individual relaxes aggression. Social tension resolved.
translation_template: I'm not a threat. I'm no challenge to you. Please, I just want peace.

intensity_modifiers.high: Please don't hurt me! I surrender completely! I'm no threat to you at all!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Okay, okay — you're the boss. I'll back down. No trouble from me.
intensity_modifiers.low: Hey, just being friendly. No competition here.

call_pattern: Long, melodic howl, often triggered by other howls or music
behavioral_meaning: Pack bonding vocalization. Reinforcing social bonds, announcing presence to distant pack members.
behavioral_response: Other dogs may join in howling. Creates group cohesion.
translation_template: I'm here! Can you hear me? I'm calling to all of you — we're a family!

intensity_modifiers.high: LISTEN TO ME! I'm calling to my pack! Everyone join in! We are TOGETHER!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Singing our song. I feel connected to all of you right now.
intensity_modifiers.low: Just howling along. Feels nice to let it out.
